forecast.name: Overnight
forecast.detailedForecast: Mostly cloudy, with a low around 56. West southwest wind around 7 mph.

forecast.name: Saturday
forecast.detailedForecast: Mostly sunny. High near 70, with temperatures falling to around 67 in the afternoon. West southwest wind 3 to 14 mph, with gusts as high as 20 mph.

weather_report:
As the twilight whispers its final notes, San Francisco carries the promise of a gentle morning, cloaked in a blanket of clouds that harbor a coolness in the air. The night lingers at a comfortable 56 degrees, with a light breeze tracing the contours of the city. On this Saturday, the sun will soon tease the horizon, ushering in a day where warmth reigns, yet there persists a subtle hint of the fog that dances at the edges of the Golden Gate and across the bay.

By midday, expect a brilliant elevation in spirit as the clouds yield to a mostly sunny embrace, with temperatures reaching towards the mid-70s before softly retreating in the afternoon. The winds will play coy, whistling gently from the west-southwest at times, intertwining with moments of warmth and coolness that reflect the city's fickle charm. The fog, while moving closer to the coast, will leave the heart of the city clear, allowing for a radiant day perfect for a leisurely stroll along the Embarcadero or a quiet moment in one of the many parks that lace the city.

Dress in layers to comfortably navigate the brisk morning and warmer afternoon, perhaps a light jacket to keep the chill at bay until the sun casts its glow. Engage in a simple treasure-seeking adventure—visit a local café for a warm brew, roam the vibrant streets lined with art, or simply pause to appreciate the shifting skyline, framed by those ever-elusive fogbanks that remind us how life in this city is an elegant balance between clarity and mystery.
